help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the security policy under the profile.

json.schema:
<prop type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_read>" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="domains">
<prop type="array" name="patternsToMatch">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array" name="groupBy">
<prop type="array" name="matchConditions" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="matchValue" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="frontendEndpointLinks">
<prop type="array" name="managedRuleSets">
<prop type="array" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="ruleGroupOverrides">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="scrubbingRules">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="routingRuleLinks">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="securityPolicyLinks">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the security policy under the profile.

command.name: create

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the security policy under the profile.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewall.associations" options="associations" group="WebApplicationFirewall">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.associations" options="associations">
<arg type="array" var="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create.domains" options="domains">
<arg type="array" var="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create.patternsToMatch" options="patterns-to-match">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules" options="rules">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].groupBy" options="group-by">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions" options="match-conditions" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].matchValue" options="match-value" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].transforms" options="transforms">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets" options="managed-rule-sets">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides" options="rule-group-overrides">
<arg type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_create>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules" options="rules">
<arg type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_create>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.policySettings.logScrubbing.scrubbingRules" options="scrubbing-rules" group="LogScrubbing">

json.schema:
<prop type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create>" name="associations" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewall.associations">
<prop type="array" name="associations" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.associations">
<prop type="array" name="domains" arg="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create.domains">
<prop type="array" name="patternsToMatch" arg="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_create.patternsToMatch">
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules">
<prop type="array" name="groupBy" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].groupBy">
<prop type="array" name="matchConditions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="matchValue" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].matchValue" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].transforms">
<prop type="array" name="managedRuleSets" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets">
<prop type="array" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="ruleGroupOverrides" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_create>" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_create>" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="scrubbingRules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.policySettings.logScrubbing.scrubbingRules">

<prop type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_read>" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="domains">
<prop type="array" name="patternsToMatch">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array" name="groupBy">
<prop type="array" name="matchConditions" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="matchValue" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="frontendEndpointLinks">
<prop type="array" name="managedRuleSets">
<prop type="array" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="ruleGroupOverrides">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="scrubbingRules">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="routingRuleLinks">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="securityPolicyLinks">

command.name: update

help.short: Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
Name of the security policy under the profile.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewall.associations" options="associations" group="WebApplicationFirewall">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.associations" options="associations">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update.domains" options="domains">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update.patternsToMatch" options="patterns-to-match">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules" options="rules">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].groupBy" options="group-by">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions" options="match-conditions">
<arg type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].matchValue" options="match-value">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].transforms" options="transforms">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets" options="managed-rule-sets">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides" options="rule-group-overrides">
<arg nullable="True" type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_update>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules" options="rules">
<arg nullable="True" type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_update>" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules[].exclusions" options="exclusions">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.policySettings.logScrubbing.scrubbingRules" options="scrubbing-rules" group="LogScrubbing">

json.schema:
<prop type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_read>" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="associations">
<prop type="array" name="domains">
<prop type="array" name="patternsToMatch">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array" name="groupBy">
<prop type="array" name="matchConditions" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="matchValue" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="transforms">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="frontendEndpointLinks">
<prop type="array" name="managedRuleSets">
<prop type="array" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="ruleGroupOverrides">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="rules">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_read>" name="exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="scrubbingRules">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="routingRuleLinks">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="securityPolicyLinks">

<prop type="array<@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update>" name="associations" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewall.associations">
<prop type="array" name="associations" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.associations">
<prop type="array" name="domains" arg="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update.domains">
<prop type="array" name="patternsToMatch" arg="@SecurityPolicyWebApplicationFirewallAssociation_update.patternsToMatch">
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules">
<prop type="array" name="groupBy" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].groupBy">
<prop type="array" name="matchConditions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="matchValue" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].matchValue" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="transforms" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.customRules.rules[].matchConditions[].transforms">
<prop type="array" name="managedRuleSets" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets">
<prop type="array" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="ruleGroupOverrides" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_update>" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="rules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules">
<prop type="array<@ManagedRuleExclusion_update>" name="exclusions" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[].ruleGroupOverrides[].rules[].exclusions">
<prop type="array" name="scrubbingRules" arg="$securityPolicy.properties.parameters.WebApplicationFirewallEmbedded.wafPolicy.properties.policySettings.logScrubbing.scrubbingRules">
